question: What is the manufacturing cluster readiness - can Chinese OEM factories actually build global brands?

findings.claim: Shenzhen 3C cluster has produced multiple globally successful OEM-to-brand transitions: Anker (TTM revenue RMB 29.3B, +32% YoY), UGREEN (59.6% overseas revenue), Shokz (revenue grew dozens-fold in 7 years to become global #1 in bone conduction)
findings.data: Anker Innovations (300866.SZ): 2024 full-year revenue RMB 24.7B (+41% YoY); TTM as of Sep 2025 reached RMB 29.3B (+32% YoY). Net profit for 9M 2025: RMB 1.93B (+31% YoY). Sells to 100M+ consumers in 146 countries. 50% of 3,615 employees in R&D with 2,245+ IP rights. UGREEN: overseas revenue rose from 50.4% (2023) to 57.5% (2024) to 59.6% (9M 2025). Shokz (韶音): 7-year revenue growth of dozens-fold, became global #1 in bone conduction headphones.

findings.claim: Anker's OEM-to-brand journey followed a three-phase pattern typical of Shenzhen companies: (1) OEM/ODM, (2) platform partner/reseller, (3) self-operated brand
findings.data: Creality (创想三维), a Shenzhen 3D printer maker, exemplifies the typical pathway: Phase 1 (pre-2016): OEM/ODM manufacturing; Phase 2 (2016-2019): products sold via Amazon large sellers as intermediary; Phase 3 (2019+): self-operated brand on Amazon and independent site. Anker followed a similar trajectory from 2011 Amazon private-label to global consumer brand. By 2025, Anker and Baseus had independent site traffic share reaching 30% with 50% higher average order value.

findings.claim: Shenzhen municipal government actively supports the cluster with smart terminal industry cluster action plans valid through 2026, pushing for high-end, intelligent, and internationalized development
findings.data: Shenzhen issued the 'Shenzhen Smart Terminal Industry Cluster Action Plan (2024-2025)' to promote high-end, intelligent, and internationalized development of the smart terminal industry cluster. Policy validity extends to December 31, 2026. The global 3C digital accessories market reached ~$1.03T in 2023, growing at 8.7% CAGR, expected to reach $1.5T by 2025.
